Description: Entry state after deposit received from Lead. Account in good standing, all payments up to date.
Entry Trigger: Initial (deposit from Lead), Payment_Pending (caught up), Delinquent (caught up)
Notes: PRIMARY ENTRY STATE. Finance state machine starts here after deposit is paid.

Description: Payment missed/overdue (within grace period). NOT an initial state - means scheduled payment was missed.
Entry Trigger: Active (payment missed), Balance_Pending (overdue), Credit_Application_Pending (admin decision), Credit_Approved (funding not received after X days), Credit_Rejected (after X days), Credit_Pending (admin decision), Delinquent (resumes payments)
Exit Trigger: Active (payment received), Payment_Complete (final payment), Delinquent (overdue > X days), Refund_Pending (admin decision), Collection_Pending (admin decision), Cancelled (admin decision)
Notes: KEY CHANGE: Not an entry state. Only reached when payment is missed.

Description: Payment significantly overdue (> X days). Collections warnings active. Account at risk of escalation.
Exit Trigger: Payment_Pending (resumes payments), Refund_Pending (refund path), Collection_Pending (collection path), Cancelled (direct, if no refund/collection needed)
Notes: Time continues to accrue in this state

Description: Account in formal collections. All access blocked. Handed off to interim/bank for processing.
Notes: Now goes to Collection_Processing (interim/bank), then Cancelled. ALL outcomes go to Cancelled via Collection_Processing.

Description: Collection handed off to interim team or bank; processing in progress (payment being processed and/or debt actively pursued). Same access as Collection_Pending.
Notes: Interim state. Payment processing and/or debt actively pursued by interim team or bank.

Description: Refund approved, awaiting handoff to interim/bank. Account is in the process of being closed.
Entry Trigger: Payment_Pending (admin decision), Delinquent (refund path), Payment_Complete (rare: post-completion refund)
Exit Trigger: Refund_Processing (handed off to interim/bank), Active (refund reversed/denied), Complete (refund reversed/denied), Payment_Pending (refund reversed/denied), Delinquent (refund reversed/denied)
Notes: Now goes to Refund_Processing (interim/bank), then Cancelled. Refund_Processing → Refund_Pending by Finance only. Refund tracked via refund_issued on Cancelled.

Description: Refund handed off to interim team or bank; processing in progress (including instant refunds). Same access as Refund_Pending.
Exit Trigger: Cancelled (refund completed), Refund_Pending (reversed by Finance team only)
Notes: Interim state. Refund_Processing → Refund_Pending may only be performed by Finance team.

Description: Third-party finance application submitted, awaiting funding. Alternative entry state to Active.
Entry Trigger: Credit_Application_Pending (credit application submitted), Credit_Rejected (resubmitted via 3rd party API)
Exit Trigger: Credit_Approved (approved), Credit_Rejected (declined), Payment_Pending (student self-pay / admin decision)
Notes: Premium Credit path. Now entered from Loan_Application_Pending (not directly from Lead).

Description: Account terminated and closed. Encompasses ALL termination types: refunds, collections, credit failures, withdrawals.
Entry Trigger: Refund_Processing (completed), Collection_Processing (settled/unsettled), Payment_Pending (admin decision), Delinquent (direct close)
Notes: KEY CHANGE: Consolidated Refunded state into Cancelled. Use refund_issued property to distinguish. Track: refund_issued, settlement_status, cancellation_reason, cancellation_date

Description: All financial obligations fulfilled. Student has fully paid for their course package. Terminal state for successful completion.
Entry Trigger: Active (final payment), Credit_Approved (funded), Balance_Pending (balance paid), Payment_Pending (final payment)
Notes: KEY CHANGE: Added Active → Complete path for direct final payment.

Description: Entry state for Premium Credit path after deposit. Student preparing/submitting credit application.
Entry Trigger: Initial (deposit from Lead, Premium Credit path)
Notes: ENTRY STATE for Premium Credit. Goes to Credit_Pending when credit application is submitted.

Description: Entry state for Bank Transfer/Direct Deposit full payment after deposit. Awaiting balance payment.
Entry Trigger: Initial (deposit from Lead, bank transfer/direct deposit full payment path)
Notes: ENTRY STATE for bank transfer/direct deposit full payment. Balance of course package remaining after deposit.

Description: Third-party finance application declined. Student has full access while determining next steps.
Exit Trigger: Credit_Approved (re-approved via 3rd party API), Credit_Pending (resubmitted via 3rd party API), Payment_Pending (after X days, automated)
Notes: Loan application rejected. Student can choose refund path, collections path, or direct closure if $0 involved.

Description: Credit/loan application approved, awaiting funding from loan company.
Entry Trigger: Credit_Pending (loan approved), Credit_Rejected (re-approved via 3rd party API)
Exit Trigger: Payment_Complete (funded successfully), Payment_Pending (funding not received after X days)
Notes: Credit approved, awaiting funding. Can exit to Payment_Pending if funding not received.
